methodology_description.text: Cross-country comparative analysis uses panel econometric methods: fixed effects, structural breaks (Bai-Perron), convergence tests, cluster analysis (4 fiscal archetypes), and Granger causality.

methodology_summary: Governance Panel: World Governance Indicators: voice, stability, effectiveness, regulation, rule of law, corruption. Source: World Bank WGI. Construction: direct. Coverage: global_205, 1996-2023.
